headline.purpose: Product titles and larger editor headings.

title.purpose: Section titles, active inspector names, and compact panel labels.

body.purpose: Dense helper copy and ordinary control labels.

label.purpose: Short uppercase state labels and value-adjacent controls.

editor-label.purpose: Graph labels, chips, tick sliders, and editor annotations.

shadows.name: seqfx-cell-raised
shadows.purpose: Sequencer cells and tactile grid controls.

shadows.name: editor-pill-shadow
shadows.purpose: Small readout pills on editor surfaces.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, active, cell, and block feedback.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Buttons, overlays, and compact panel transitions.

narrative.overview: Cosimo's current interface language is an observed baseline, not a finished doctrine. It contains two active skins: Cosimo Synth uses a dark, instrument-like surface with cyan, pink, warm amber, and compact technical overlays; SeqFX and the shared editor controls use a warmer ink-on-material surface with tactile sequencer cells and graph-editor details. Future work should treat these as product-specific evidence, then tighten them into a clearer family.
keyCharacteristics: Dense expert controls with readable hierarchy, not onboarding-first softness.
Product-specific skins under one disciplined maker, not one templated line.
Technical visual proof: waveforms, filter response, modulation curves, sequencer blocks, and state readouts.
Retrofuturist accent details used sparingly, never as full cosplay.
Current tokens are descriptive baseline tokens. Promote them to doctrine only after a deliberate cleanup pass.

rules.name: The Baseline Is Not Gospel Rule
rules.body: Documented colors describe what exists now. New work should normalize future tokens to OKLCH and reduce one-off hex and inline rgba values instead of copying the current sprawl.

rules.name: The Accent Has a Job Rule
rules.body: Cyan, pink, amber, coral, and green must signal sound, interaction, selection, focus, or timing. They are not decorative confetti.

rules.name: The Product Skin Rule
rules.body: Cosimo Synth may stay dark and spectral; SeqFX may stay warm and gridded. Do not blend both palettes into one screen unless the workflow explicitly crosses both instruments.

rules.name: The No Display Font Rule
rules.body: Product surfaces do not use decorative display fonts in labels, buttons, controls, data, or graph text.

rules.name: The Mono Means Measurement Rule
rules.body: Use mono type for values, timing, table positions, rates, MIDI notes, and technical labels. Do not use mono as a personality blanket.

rules.name: The Depth Proves Interaction Rule
rules.body: Use elevation for draggable cells, floating controls, active overlays, and panel layering. Do not use shadows to make empty decoration feel expensive.

dos: Do treat this file as documentation of the current visual baseline, with explicit permission to improve it.
Do make product visuals prove the product: waveform canvases, filter curves, modulation shapes, sequencer blocks, and real state readouts.
Do normalize future color work into OKLCH tokens before promoting it to a stable design system.
donts: Don't follow Ableton's website by replacing product proof with conceptual editorial art direction.
Don't follow Soundtoys by declaring attitude through cartoon names, red/orange maximalism, knobs with faces, or performed irreverence.
Don't use skeuomorphic plugin costume: no photoreal wood, brushed aluminum, decorative screws, or VU meters as decoration.
Don't merge the dark synth palette and the warm SeqFX palette into one generic "Cosimo look" without a concrete workflow reason.

components.name: Synth Button
components.description: Compact pill control for synth actions and mode changes.
components.css: .ds-synth-button { min-height: 34px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #eef2f5; font: 700 10px/1 "SF Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", Menlo, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-synth-button:hover { border-color: rgba(135,215,245,0.35); background: rgba(135,215,245,0.10); color: #cffafe; } .ds-synth-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #87d7f5; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-synth-button:active { background: rgba(245,108,182,0.14); }

components.name: Synth Icon Button
components.description: Square icon control for graph modes and compact commands.
components.html: <button class="ds-synth-icon" aria-label="Cycle mode"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 16c4-8 8-8 16 0"/><path d="M4 8c4 8 8 8 16 0"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-synth-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45); color: #eef2f5; box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.32); transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-synth-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; } .ds-synth-icon:hover { border-color: rgba(135,215,245,0.3); color: #cffafe; } .ds-synth-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #87d7f5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Synth Range
components.description: Horizontal musical range control used for depth, rate, and compact parameters.
components.css: .ds-synth-range { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: rgba(226,232,240,0.72); font: 700 10px/1 "SF Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", Menlo, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-synth-range input { appearance: none; width: 240px; height: 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(84,99,201,0.45), rgba(245,108,182,0.45)); outline: none; } .ds-synth-range input::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance: none; width: 22px; height: 22px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffd8a6 0%, #f56cb6 100%); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(245,108,182,0.35); } .ds-synth-range input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #87d7f5; outline-offset: 6px; }

components.name: Modulation Amount Knob
components.description: Compact circular modulation depth control with numeric readout.
components.html: 37%
components.css: .ds-mod-knob { position: relative; width: 72px; height: 72px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(12,18,34,0.98), rgba(6,9,20,0.98)); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08), 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); color: #cffafe; } .ds-mod-knob svg { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; fill: none; } .ds-mod-knob circle { stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); stroke-width: 4; } .ds-mod-knob path { stroke: rgba(103,232,249,0.92); stroke-width: 4; stroke-linecap: round; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(103,232,249,0.3)); } .ds-mod-knob span { font: 700 11px/1 "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-mod-knob i { position: absolute; top: 7px; left: 50%; width: 3px; height: 21px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fef3c7 0%, #f472b6 100%); transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(42deg); transform-origin: 50% 29px; }

components.name: Editor Chip
components.description: Small value chip that rides on graph and editor surfaces.
components.css: .ds-editor-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(28,28,28,0.28); border-radius: 3px; padding: 3px 6px; background: #1c1c1c; color: #f0ece6; font: 800 10px/1 Menlo, Monaco, "Liberation Mono", monospace; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(28,28,28,0.1); }

components.name: SeqFX Pattern Button
components.description: Numbered pattern selector for the SeqFX top bar.
components.css: .ds-seqfx-pattern { min-width: 28px; height: 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(28,28,28,0.16); border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(28,28,28,0.035); color: #1c1c1c; font: 700 13px/1 "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-seqfx-pattern:hover { border-color: rgba(28,28,28,0.34); background: rgba(139,191,154,0.12); } .ds-seqfx-pattern.is-selected { border-color: rgba(139,191,154,0.9); background: #8bbf9a; color: #0f1511; } .ds-seqfx-pattern:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f2d16b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-seqfx-pattern:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: SeqFX Block
components.description: Draggable step block with lane identity, tactile fill, and resize affordance.
components.css: .ds-seqfx-block { position: relative; width: 112px; height: 28px; border: 0; border-radius: 3px; background: transparent; cursor: grab; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-seqfx-block-fill { position: absolute; inset: 1px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 3px; background: #f4d35e; color: #1a1815; box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.10); } .ds-seqfx-block-fill::after { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 1px, transparent 1.2px); background-size: 2.5px 2.5px; content: ""; mix-blend-mode: multiply; } .ds-seqfx-block b, .ds-seqfx-block small { position: absolute; z-index: 1; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-seqfx-block b { top: 4px; left: 5px; font-size: 7px; letter-spacing: 0.10em; } .ds-seqfx-block small { right: 5px; bottom: 4px; font-size: 8px; } .ds-seqfx-block i { position: absolute; top: 5px; right: 3px; bottom: 5px; width: 2px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(28,28,28,0.55); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-seqfx-block:hover .ds-seqfx-block-fill { filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-seqfx-block:hover i, .ds-seqfx-block:focus-visible i { opacity: 1; } .ds-seqfx-block:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f2d16b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: SeqFX Field
components.description: Raised warm input field for inspector controls.
components.css: .ds-seqfx-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; width: 260px; color: #1c1c1c; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-seqfx-field span { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-seqfx-field em { border: 1px solid rgba(242,209,107,0.4); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 6px; color: #8b6d18; font-size: 10px; font-style: normal; } .ds-seqfx-field input { width: 100%; min-height: 34px; border: 0; border-radius: 7px; padding: 6px 9px; background: rgba(222,216,204,0.68); accent-color: #8bbf9a; box-shadow: 1px 1.3px 2.2px rgba(126,116,101,0.26), -0.8px -0.8px 1.6px rgba(255,248,232,0.58), inset 0.5px 0.5px 0 rgba(255,248,232,0.38), inset -0.5px -0.5px 0 rgba(126,116,101,0.12); } .ds-seqfx-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f2d16b; outline-offset: 2px; }
